title: ocimum reclinatum
intro: Ocimum reclinatum is a species of plant in the mint family known as Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant has shown medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. Ocimum reclinatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
